BF16/FP16: both K and N divisible by 16
INT8: K divisible by 16, N divisible by 32

vllm.author: louie-tsai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Perf regression after #32723.
The PR unset default temperature from 0, so the temperature changes can alter output path variance.
Since we need to identify perf regression issue so we need deterministic results.

vllm.title: [Tool Parser][2/3] Use self.tools instead of request.tools in tool parsers
vllm.author: sfeng33
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Migrate tool parsers to read tools from self.tools (set at construction) instead of request.tools at call time. This is part 2 of the tool parser cleanup series following #38029.
Update the base ToolParser.__init__ to filter and store only ChatCompletionToolsParam | FunctionTool instances

vllm.title: [kv_offload+HMA] Fix num_blocks with different per-layer page sizes and improve assert message
vllm.author: kfirtoledo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Use kv_cache_config.num_blocks instead of reading num_blocks from individual tensor
shapes in OffloadingConnectorWorker. With UniformTypeKVCacheSpecs, layers have different
page sizes, so tensors are reshaped with different dimensions — reading num_blocks back
from a tensor shape can return

vllm.title: [OOT] Add OOT support for linear kernel.
vllm.author: menogrey
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
There is a linear kernel refactor in progress, but the OOT hardware plugin can only patch the upstream linear kernel global variables to use it, this PR introduces the register_linear_kernel interface to better support it.
Test Plan
This PR will cause no affect to upstream. I try it with vll
